debug_info.goal:
μ : ℝ
v : NNReal
n : ℕ
h1 : ¬v = 0
h2 : v > 0
f : ℝ → ℝ := fun x => x ^ (2 * n + 1) * √(4 * ↑v - x ^ 2)
⊢ ∀ (x : ℝ), f (-1 * x) = -f x

failed_attempts:
simp [pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one, pow_two, mul_neg, neg_mul]
        <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try simp_all [Nat.add_assoc]) <;>
        (try simp_all [Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mul]) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith)
        <;>
        (try omega)
      rw [h₄]
      <;> ring_nf
    rw [h₂]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try simp_all [Nat.add_assoc]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mul]) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try linarith)
    <;>
    (try omega)

simp [pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one]
        <;> ring_nf
      rw [h₅₂]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> norm_num
      <;> simp_all [pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> norm_num
    have h₆ : √(4 * ↑v - ((-1) * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * ↑v - x ^ 2) := by
      have h₆₁ : ((-1) * x : ℝ) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by
        ring_nf
        <;> simp_all [pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one]
        <;> ring_nf
      rw [h₆₁]
    rw [h₅, h₆]
    ring_nf
    <;> simp_all [pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one]
    <;> ring_nf
  simp_all

simp only [f]
    have h4 : ((-x : ℝ) : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
      have h5 : (2 * n + 1 : ℕ) % 2 = 1 := by
        omega
      rw [show ((-x : ℝ) : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) by
        rw [← neg_one_mul_x_pow _ _]
        simp [h5, pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one, mul_neg, neg_mul]
        <;>
        ring_nf <;>
        simp_all [pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one, mul_neg, neg_mul]
        <;>
        linarith]
    have h6 : Real.sqrt (4 * (v : ℝ) - (-x : ℝ) ^ 2) = Real.sqrt (4 * (v : ℝ) - (x : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [pow_two]
      <;>
      ring_nf
    calc
      ((-x : ℝ) : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1) * Real.sqrt (4 * (v : ℝ) - (-x : ℝ) ^ 2) = (- (x ^ (2 * n + 1))) * Real.sqrt (4 * (v : ℝ) - (-x : ℝ) ^ 2) := by rw [h4]
      _ = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1) * Real.sqrt (4 * (v : ℝ) - (x : ℝ) ^ 2)) := by
        rw [h6]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp_all [pow_two]
        <;>
        ring_nf
      _ = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1) * Real.sqrt (4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2)) := by simp
  have h7 : f ((-1) * x) = f (-x) := by
    simp [mul_neg]
  rw [h7, h3]
  <;>
  simp_all [f]
  <;>
  ring_nf
  <;>
  simp_all [pow_two]
  <;>
  ring_nf

simp only [f]
    have h₃ : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
      have h₄ : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = (-1 : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1) * x ^ (2 * n + 1) := by
        rw [mul_pow]
      rw [h₄]
      have h₅ : (-1 : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1) = -1 := by
        rw [pow_add]

        <;>

    have h₆ : √ (4 * (v : ℝ) - (-1 * x) ^ 2) = √ (4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      have h₇ : (-1 * x : ℝ) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by ring

    rw [h₃, h₆]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    field_simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
    <;>

  <;>

          have h0 : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
            have h0a : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = (-1 : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1) * x ^ (2 * n + 1) := by

          have h1 : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - (-1 * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
            have h1a : (-1 * x : ℝ) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by ring
            rw [h1a]
          rw [h0, h1]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> norm_num

simp [pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one, mul_neg, neg_mul]
            <;>
            ring_nf
            <;>
            norm_num
          rw [this]
          <;> ring_nf
        _ = -((x : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by ring_nf
    have h4 : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - (-1 * x : ℝ) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      have h5 : (-1 * x : ℝ) ^ 2 = (x : ℝ) ^ 2 := by
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp [pow_two]
        <;>
        ring_nf
      rw [h5]
      <;>

    calc
      ((-1 * x) : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1) * √(4 * (v : ℝ) - (-1 * x : ℝ) ^ 2)
        = -((x : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1)) * √(4 * (v : ℝ) - (-1 * x : ℝ) ^ 2) := by rw [h3]
      _ = -((x : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1)) * √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by rw [h4]
      _ = -((x : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1) * √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2)) := by ring_nf

simp [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.mod_mod]
        omega
      have h₇ : (-1 : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1) = -1 := by
        have h₈ : (2 * n + 1 : ℕ) % 2 = 1 := h₆
        have h₉ : (2 * n + 1 : ℕ) = 2 * n + 1 := by simp
        rw [← Nat.mod_add_div (2 * n + 1) 2]
        simp [h₈, pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one, pow_zero, mul_neg, mul_one]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> simp_all

      exact h₇

    <;> ring_nf

    have h₅ : (4 : ℝ) * (v : ℝ) - (-1 * x : ℝ) ^ 2 = (4 : ℝ) * (v : ℝ) - (x : ℝ) ^ 2 := by

  rw [h₃, h₄]
  <;> ring_nf
